text: Once your users feel ready, we start training.
First, we agree on your goals.
After that, we book a walkthrough.
Welcome, Mike. First, let us agree on your main goals, and then I will build your success plan around them.
Sounds good. Our main goal is to get the whole sales team using the tool every day.
Perfect. Then we configure the platform and set up your first license. Who will be your internal champion?
That will be me. After that, what is the next step for my users?
After that, I run a hands-on walkthrough. Once your users feel comfortable, we move on to training and best practices.
I like this plan. So adoption really grows step by step.

Hi Patricia, this is Mike from the onboarding team, leaving you a quick voice note before our kickoff call so we are on the same page. Here is the order I suggest for the new account. First, on the call, let us confirm their main goals and who their internal champion will be, because adoption is so much easier when one person owns it on their side. Then, we help them configure the platform and set up the first license, so the tool is ready to use. After that, I will run a hands-on walkthrough with their users, so they see exactly how the product works in real life. Once they feel comfortable, we move on to proper training and share the best practices our strongest teams use every day. The whole idea is to drive real adoption, not just to switch the software on. If they actually use it and see the value, the renewal takes care of itself. Talk soon, and send me their goals before the call if you can.

Hi Patricia, this is Sofia, the admin on the customer side, leaving you a short message after our first month on the plan. I just wanted to say thank you, because the step-by-step approach really worked for us. The kickoff call was clear, and naming a champion was a great idea; the whole team now asks me first instead of guessing. The walkthrough was the moment things clicked for my users. Before it, people were nervous about the new tool, but once they saw how simple it was to configure their own dashboards, they relaxed. The training and the best practices you shared have saved us a lot of time. If I am honest, we still have one weak spot. Two people in finance have not really started using the product yet, so their adoption is low. Could we add a small extra walkthrough just for them in next month's plan? Apart from that, we are very happy. We can already see the value, and we would love to talk about the next phase. Thanks again for all the support.
First, we agree on the customer's goals.
After that, we add the users.
Once the team feels ready, we start training.
Finally, when everyone is onboarded, we celebrate the wins.
We configure the platform together on day one.
First, we agree on your goals.
After that, we book a walkthrough.
Once your users feel ready, we start training.
Adoption grows when people see the value.
